name: Black Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small can sliced water chestnuts (8 oz.)
1/2 cup sliced red and green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Fluff the bulghur in water.
2. Mix all ingredients; warm through to blend flavors and thaw.
Notes:
This was good, but would be better with less water chestnuts.
Nice blend of flavors and textures.
